title: Escapism
html: Stub. Yahir's recurring "go somewhere else and start over" impulse — Vietnam / Thailand / Portland surface across journal entries when Austin life feels stuck. Yahir himself flags it as escapism in 2026 02 21 thoughts and things 2 21 2026 ("Been feeling the urge to escape again. Go to vietnam or thailand and get a pad for a couple of months and build out there… I think this is a form of escapism"). Recurs in 2026 04 04 im drowning a bit as a counterfactual "lets assume that I moved back to oregon portland?" exercise. The concept is doing two jobs at once: a real geographic option Yahir keeps near the surface, AND a label he uses on himself to dismiss the option.

related.label: I'm drowning a bit — April 4 journal entry (Rankett treadmill, Emily ending, dad as cook)
Thoughts and Things 2/21/2026 — Cameron's Birthday + Emily Doubt + Escape Urge
